title: T-031 — sampling_plans + sampling_records schema + AQL ISO 2859 seed
prompt:
# T-031 — sampling_plans + sampling_records schema + AQL seed

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §6.3 sampling_plans, §6.3 sampling_records, §7.1 EPIC 8C
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create sampling_plans + sampling_records tables per §6.3, RLS policies, and seed the AQL ISO 2859 standard rows for inspection_level GII at AQL 1.0/2.5/4.0 across lot size bands.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0121_sampling_plans.sql` per §6.3 verbatim: sampling_plans (plan_type CHECK, aql_level, inspection_level, lot_size_min/max, sample_size, accept/reject numbers); sampling_records FK inspection_id ON DELETE CASCADE.
2. Seed sampling_plans with the standard ISO 2859 GII rows for AQL 1.0 / 2.5 / 4.0 (~12 rows total per AQL covering lot_size bands 2-8 / 9-15 / 16-25 / 26-50 / 51-90 / 91-150 / 151-280 / 281-500 / 501-1200 / 1201-3200 / 3201-10000 / 10001-35000).
3. Helper `apps/web/src/server/quality/getDefaultSamplingPlan.ts` returning the matching row given (lot_size, aql_level, inspection_level).
4. RLS tenant_isolation on both tables.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0121_sampling_plans.sql [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/getDefaultSamplingPlan.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/sampling-plans-schema.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/getDefaultSamplingPlan.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0121 applied, when SELECT FROM sampling_plans WHERE inspection_level='GII' runs, then 36 seeded rows exist (12 lot size bands x 3 AQL levels) all active=true
2. Given getDefaultSamplingPlan({lot_size:120, aql:2.5, level:'GII'}), when called, then it returns the row whose lot_size_min<=120<=lot_size_max with aql_level=2.5 and inspection_level='GII'
3. Given a sampling_records insert with accept_reject='accept' and defects_found exceeding plan.accept_number, then the helper returns a structured anomaly warning (logged, not blocking) — assert via test fake

pipeline_inputs.description: Sampling plans + sampling records tables + AQL ISO 2859 GII seed for AQL 1.0/2.5/4.0 + helper to pick default plan by lot size.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0121 emits both tables per §6.3 with CHECK enums and FK CASCADE on records. Seeds 36 ISO 2859 GII rows. Helper getDefaultSamplingPlan picks the matching row by lot size + AQL + level. Anomaly warning when accept exceeds plan.accept_number.
out_of_scope: Do not implement sampling plan UI (T-035)
Do not implement custom sampling plans (P2)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0121 applied, when SELECT FROM sampling_plans WHERE inspection_level='GII' runs, then 36 seeded rows exist (12 lot bands x 3 AQL levels) all active=true
Given getDefaultSamplingPlan({lot_size:120, aql:2.5, level:'GII'}), when called, then it returns the row with lot_size_min<=120<=lot_size_max and aql_level=2.5
Given a sampling_records insert with defects_found > plan.accept_number but accept_reject='accept', then the helper emits a structured anomaly warning (logged, not blocking) — verified via test fake
test_strategy: RED: write packages/db/__tests__/sampling-plans-schema.test.ts and apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/getDefaultSamplingPlan.test.ts asserting seed count, helper lookup, anomaly warning
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test getDefaultSamplingPlan'
risk_red_lines: Do not deviate from ISO 2859 GII row counts (36 rows for the 3 AQLs)
Do not allow accept_reject='accept' to override plan limits silently
